assertionResults.title: ECDH happy path surfaces a completion

steps.action: Dispatch ECDH from Dashboard Test ECDH panel to online peer pubkey
steps.expected: Pending ECDH request_id appears then completion is surfaced
steps.observed: Dispatched request_id 3289d0d91b1338d947d9e89ae1b6b0fa; Ecdh completion surfaced with shared_secret_hex32 and pending entry removed

evidence.network: Runtime relay state online at ws://127.0.0.1:8194 during dispatch/completion

steps.action: Dispatch ping to online peer via handleRuntimeCommand({type:'ping'})
steps.expected: Peer row last_seen increases within 3s of completion
steps.observed: request_id 450d33e4bf29d72f49f90a40a20d631c completed; online peer last_seen advanced from 1776788236 to 1776788256

assertionResults.title: refresh_all_peers fans out to every known peer

steps.expected: Online peers get later last_seen; offline peers do not show silent success
steps.observed: Online peer last_seen advanced from 1776788281 to 1776788294 within 15s; offline peer remained offline with unchanged last_seen (null) while timeout failures continued to surface

evidence.network: Relay online; runtime failures for offline peer were timeout-class ping failures

assertionResults.title: Tab backgrounding does not drop in-flight ops

steps.action: Dispatch sign then switch to another tab for >20s and return
steps.expected: visibilityState hidden/visible transitions captured and in-flight op preserved across hidden window
steps.observed: Sign request_id 443224854f8cc82f66908d86ea3b480b transitioned to timeout failure after foreground, but visibility log remained ['visible'] (no hidden transition observable in this agent-browser run)

evidence.network: No websocket/frame visibility-state linkage observable from agent-browser for background tab

assertionResults.issues: Could not observe document.visibilityState hidden transition in headless agent-browser tab switching, so VAL-OPS-021 visibility evidence could not be conclusively collected.

assertionResults.title: TTL expiry transitions pending op to failure deterministically

steps.action: Dispatch sign while peer unavailable; capture timeout_at from pending operation
steps.expected: On TTL expiry, pending request disappears and timeout failure surfaces within ~2s with failure UI
steps.observed: request_id 2d416b08b6743e0da084a527138fd74c had timeout_at 1776788803; timeout failure surfaced at 1776788804 (1s after timeout), pending entry removed, SigningFailedModal shown

evidence.network: Timeout failure observed while relay path remained configured at ws://127.0.0.1:8194

assertionResults.title: Relay reconnect correlates completions back to original request_ids

steps.action: Attempt relay drop/reconnect mid-flight (set offline on/off) during pending sign
steps.expected: Post-reconnect completion should match original pending request_id with observable reconnect evidence
steps.observed: Pending sign request_id 6a4aa1c3c1323cebda291a7b27fd194b timed out; no post-reconnect completion observed and relay lastConnectedAt did not expose a reconnect transition in this run

evidence.network: agent-browser network request capture returned no websocket request/frame data for reconnect verification

assertionResults.issues: Reconnect + post-reconnect completion correlation could not be conclusively validated due missing websocket reconnect/frame observability in agent-browser and timeout outcome during reconnect attempt.

assertionResults.title: Window close cleans up pending OPS state

steps.action: Start in-flight sign request, close dashboard tab, reopen same profile
steps.expected: Closed-session request_id absent after reopen and websocket close frame evidence available
steps.observed: Pre-close request_id 71e166db16b723a5082fe7be8525c712 was pending; after reopen pending_operations was empty and stale request_id absent, but websocket close frame code (1000/1001) could not be captured

evidence.network: No websocket close-frame code capture available from agent-browser network output

assertionResults.issues: Pending-state cleanup behavior verified, but required WS close frame code evidence could not be observed with available tooling.

frictions.description: In this run, headless tab switching did not expose document.visibilityState hidden transitions via in-page logging.
frictions.resolution: Worked around by validating operation outcome after foreground return, but visibility transition requirement remained unobservable.

frictions.description: agent-browser network capture returned no websocket requests/frames/close codes during relay reconnect and window-close checks.
frictions.resolution: Used runtimeStatus/runtimeRelays snapshots and request_id correlation where possible, but WS-frame evidence remained unavailable.

blockers.description: Could not collect required visibilityState hidden->visible evidence in this headless agent-browser execution.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Installed visibilitychange logger, backgrounded tab for >20s, and rechecked log; only 'visible' was recorded.

blockers.description: Could not obtain websocket reconnect/close frame-level telemetry (request/frame/close-code) from agent-browser network output.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Used set offline on/off, runtime relay state checks, network request capture, and post-reopen pending-state validation; frame-level evidence still unavailable.
